element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Walk, climb ladders, navigate platform layout
Understand item collection mechanic and time pressure
Timed collection before items disappear; quota varies by level
Learn chase patterns and evasion; understand invulnerability window
One per level; grants brief invincibility and enables Brutus elimination
Destroy bottles, vultures, skulls; hit punching bag for stun bonus
Alternative threat replacing or supplementing Brutus
Destroy with punch or dodge; instant death on contact
Punching bag mechanic creates tactical options

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting quota of items completes level
Safe zones on upper platforms away from Brutus reach
Punching bag stun creates temporary breathing room
typical_tension_triggers: Spinach eaten but effects wearing off
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-like tension: collection pressure balanced against chase sequences; spinach power-ups provide cyclical relief and reversal moments

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Punching bag knock-down bonus on first screen of cycle suggests exploration for hidden scoring opportunities

difficulty_curve.early_game: Level 1 introduces all core mechanics: collection, evasion, spinach power, and basic combat in single-screen environment
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Level 2 escalates with Sea Hag introduction and modified item distribution (16 notes instead of 24 hearts)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Level 3 maintains pressure with HELP letter collection (24 items); cycles loop with increasing speed
notable_spikes: Introduction of Brutus in Level 1—first combat-avoidance pressure
Sea Hag appearance—alters threat geometry and evasion patterns
Item quota completion timing becomes tighter in repeated cycles

notable_level_patterns.description: Popeye must balance time collecting items (safe activity) against avoiding Brutus aggression; spinach pickup creates temporary role reversal where Popeye pursues
Three fixed screens per game cycle; no horizontal scrolling; vertical movement between platforms and ladders is primary navigation method
First screen of each cycle features punching bag on hook; hitting it drops bucket stunning Brutus temporarily and awarding bonus points—optional high-risk, high-reward action
Quota and item type changes between levels (24 hearts → 16 notes → 24 letters) to maintain difficulty progression
